::: {.case-grid}

::: {.case-card}
![](images/girl-detective-with-magnifying-glass.png){.case-icon}

### Case #1  
## What is the function of Broca's area?

**Evidence:** 1, 2, 3.

[Open case file](case-brocas.qmd){.case-button}
:::

::: {.case-card}
![](images/little-boy-detective.png){.case-icon}

### Case #2  
## Does multilingualism protect the brain?

**Evidence:** 1, 2, 3.

[Open case file](case-multilingualism.qmd){.case-button}
:::

::: {.case-card}
![](images/little-girl-detective.png){.case-icon}

### Case #3  
## Are large language models anything like humans?

**Evidence:** 1, 2, 3.

[Open case file](case-llms.qmd){.case-button}
:::

::: {.case-card}
![](images/boy-detective-with-magnifying-glass.png){.case-icon}

### Case #4  
## What is the status of infants' language networks?

**Evidence:** 1, 2, 3.

[Open case file](case-sign-language.qmd){.case-button}
:::

::: {.case-card}
![](images/boy-detective-with-magnifying-glass.png){.case-icon}


### Case #5  
## What is the function of neural oscillations?

**Evidence:** 1, 2, 3.

[Open case file](case-oscillations.qmd){.case-button}
:::
:::
